brand.name: Al Haual
brand.tagline: We build quality... and shape the future

hero.headline: We build quality... and shape the future
hero.subheadline: Al Haual: a leader in Saudi real-estate development and investment, crafting residential excellence with a full one-year maintenance warranty.

valueProps.sectionHeadline: Solid engineering. Absolute commitment. Enduring trust.

engineering.title: Modern, high-quality engineering
engineering.body: We design and execute every project to the latest engineering standards with premium finishes and high-quality materials, matched to the ambitions of the market.

deadlines.title: Commitment to deadlines and precise execution
deadlines.body: We honour each project's schedule with disciplined construction management that delivers on time without compromising quality.

maintenance.title: One-year warranty and maintenance
maintenance.body: Every Al Haual project ships with a full warranty on the workmanship and a free maintenance service for a full year post-handover.

featured.headline: Our Featured Projects
featured.empty: Selected projects will appear here as they're announced. Contact us to learn what's currently available.

trustBanner.headline: Full one-year maintenance warranty
trustBanner.body: Our confidence in our work shows in our guarantees. Every Al Haual project comes with a full warranty on the workmanship and one year of post-sale maintenance service.

filter.searchPlaceholder: Search by project name or district

results.empty: No properties match the current filters. Try widening your search.
results.emptyNoFilters: No properties listed yet. Contact us about what's available soon.

contact.title: Schedule a Viewing
contact.body: Speak with our sales advisors about {title}. Replies usually within an hour during business hours.
contact.messageTemplate: Hello Al Haual, I'd like more information about {title} ({url}).

about.pageTitle: Saudi real estate, built with discipline.
about.pageDescription: Al Haual Real Estate Development & Investment Company is a Saudi developer specialising in buying, developing, and investing in land and buildings to the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship — delivering modern residential and investment projects that match the ambitions of our clients and the Saudi market.
about.missionBody: Integrated developments — villas, duplexes, apartments, and investment buildings — designed and executed with meticulous attention to detail. Premium materials, modern engineering standards, and finishes that age well.
about.trustBody: Client trust is the foundation of our work. Every Al Haual project ships with full warranties on the workmanship and one year of post-handover maintenance — so the quality stays in place long after the keys change hands.

values.relationships: Long-term client relationships built on trust

about.ctaTitle: Ready to discuss your next home?
about.ctaBody: Browse the current catalog or reach our sales team directly via WhatsApp.

contact.pageDescription: Tell us what you're looking for — investment, family home, or a specific district — and our sales advisors will reach out. Most enquiries get a reply within one business hour.
contact.directBody: Prefer instant reply? Tap WhatsApp for a one-tap chat in Arabic or English.

fields.inquiryTypeMaintenanceHint: Issue with a delivered unit (post-handover service)
fields.name: Your name
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about what you're looking for…
fields.messageMaintenancePlaceholder: Project / building / unit number, and what needs attention…

contact.successBody: Thank you. A sales advisor will reach out shortly.
contact.successBodyMaintenance: Thank you. Our maintenance team will be in touch to schedule a visit.

errors.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid Saudi phone number (05XXXXXXXX) or an international number with country code.
errors.rate_limited: You've sent several messages recently. Please wait a minute before trying again.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side. Please WhatsApp us instead — link above.
errors.network_error: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.

ar.title: هذه الصفحة لم نعد ننشرها
ar.body: ربما تم نقل العقار، أو لم يعد الرابط صالحاً. تصفح المشاريع المتاحة أو تواصل معنا للاستفسار.

en.title: This page isn't available
en.body: The property may have moved, or the link is no longer valid. Browse the current catalog or get in touch.

consent.body: We use cookies for essential site functionality and to record WhatsApp lead clicks and contact form submissions you initiate. No third-party advertising trackers.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: The error has been logged. Try again in a moment, or head back to the home page.

footer.tagline: We build quality... and shape the future
footer.about: Al Haual Real Estate Development and Investment Company — a Saudi developer crafting residential and investment projects to the highest quality standards, backed by a full one-year maintenance warranty.
footer.rights: © {year} Al Haual Real Estate Development & Investment Company. All rights reserved.

draftBanner.label: This property is a draft.
draftBanner.body: It won't appear on the public site until you publish it. Once published, visitors can see it at {publicHref}.
draftBanner.failureToast: Couldn't publish. Please refresh and try again.

actions.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone. Use Archive for reversible removal.
actions.archiveConfirm: Archive "{title}"? The listing will be hidden from the public site but can be restored.
actions.failureToast: The action failed. Please refresh and try again.

amenities.heading: Amenities
amenities.hint: Tick the features that apply. Changes save automatically.
amenities.savedBadge: {count, plural, =0 {No amenities} =1 {1 amenity selected} other {# amenities selected}}
amenities.saveFailed: Couldn't save that change. Refresh the page and try again.

images.sectionDescription: Upload property photos. Each photo can be up to 25 MB — JPG, PNG, or WebP.
images.createModeHint: Save the property first. Once it's saved, you'll be able to add photos here.
images.dropzoneIdle: Drag photos here, or click to choose files
images.dropzoneActive: Drop the files to start uploading
images.altPlaceholder: Short description for screen readers — required.
images.noImages: No photos yet. Use the uploader above to add the first one.
images.altMissing: Add alt_ar and alt_en before uploading.
images.fileError_unsupported_format: {filename}: unsupported format. Use JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, or HEIC.
images.fileError_input_too_large: {filename}: file is too large. Maximum is 25 MB.
images.deleteConfirm: Delete this photo? It will be removed from both the admin gallery and the public catalog.
images.reorderHint: Drag a photo to reorder, or use the move buttons below each tile. The first photo is the default hero unless one is explicitly set.
images.reorderFailed: We couldn't save the new order. Please try again.
images.setHeroFailed: We couldn't set this photo as the hero. Please try again.

empty.title: No properties yet
empty.body: Once you add your first property, it will appear here with full filter, search, and edit controls. Drafts and archived rows are also visible to admins.

form.newSubtitle: Fields marked with an asterisk are required. The slug is generated from the English title if you leave it blank.

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invalid_json: We couldn't read the form payload. Please try again.
errors.invalid_body: Please correct the highlighted fields and submit again.
errors.invalid_slug: The URL slug is invalid — leave it blank to auto-generate one.
errors.no_changes: No changes detected. Edit a field before submitting.
errors.slug_taken: Another property already uses this URL slug. Pick a different one.
errors.insert_failed: We couldn't create the property. Try again or contact support.
errors.update_failed: We couldn't save the changes. Try again or contact support.
errors.network_error: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

filter.exportCsvAria: Download leads matching the current filters as a CSV file

actions.patchFailed: We couldn't save that change. Please try again.

empty.title: No leads yet
empty.body: When a visitor taps WhatsApp on a property, fills the contact form, or taps a call link, it lands here with the source tagged automatically.
empty.filtered: No leads match the current filters. Try widening your search.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: At-a-glance overview of your Command Center session.

leads.title: Leads Journal
leads.description: Inbound WhatsApp clicks, contact-form messages, and call clicks.

analytics.title: Strategic Analytics
analytics.description: Funnel KPIs, source mix, and top cities.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.description: Identity, sign-in details, and account security.

properties.title: Listing Management
properties.subtitle: Review, add, and update Al Haual residential projects.
properties.placeholder: The full listings table — with server-side pagination, status filters, and the add/edit property wizard — lands in PR 3.3. Until then, properties are seeded locally and the public catalog reads them in read-only mode.

leads.title: Leads Journal
leads.subtitle: Inbound contact attempts from WhatsApp, the contact form, and call clicks.
leads.subtitleWithCount: {total, plural, =1 {1 inbound lead} other {# inbound leads}} — newest first.

analytics.title: Strategic Analytics
analytics.subtitle: KPI snapshot, lead-velocity trend, source mix, and top cities by lead count.

admins.title: Admin Management
admins.subtitle: Invite, promote, and deactivate administrators (super-admin only).
admins.subtitleWithCount: {total, plural, =1 {1 administrator} other {# administrators}} — invite, promote, or deactivate.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Your identity, sign-in details, and account security.

charts.emptyMessage: No data yet. Charts populate once leads start arriving.

emailForm.heading: Change email address
emailForm.intro: Supabase will send a confirmation link to the new address. Sign-in only switches once you click that link.
emailForm.successPending: Check your new inbox for a confirmation link.
emailForm.errorSame: The new email must be different from the current one.
emailForm.errorRateLimited: Too many recent attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
emailForm.errorGeneric: Couldn’t update email. Please try again.

passwordForm.heading: Change password
passwordForm.intro: Pick a fresh password — at least 8 characters. You will stay signed in on this device.
passwordForm.errorSame: The new password must be different from the current one.
passwordForm.errorGeneric: Couldn’t update password. Please try again.

empty.title: No administrators yet
empty.body: Invite the first administrator. They'll receive an email with a link to set their password.

actions.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {name}? They will lose admin access immediately.
actions.failureToast: Action failed. Try again or check the server logs.

invite.subtitle: Send an invitation email so the new admin can set their password.
invite.hint: The invitee will receive an email with a one-time link. The link expires after 24 hours.

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: Only super admins can invite new administrators.
errors.invalid_json: We couldn't read the form payload. Please try again.
errors.invalid_body: Please correct the highlighted fields and submit again.
errors.email_taken: This email is already an administrator (or has a pending invite).
errors.invite_failed: Supabase rejected the invite. Check email deliverability and try again.
errors.invite_smtp_failed: Supabase couldn't send the invite email — its mail relay timed out. Configure custom SMTP (see docs/PHASE_3_RUNBOOK.md §8) and retry.
errors.insert_failed: We couldn't create the admin record. The invite email may still arrive; check the audit log.
errors.network_error: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.intro: Enter your administrator email and password.

errors.invalidInput: Please enter a valid email and a password of at least 6 characters.
errors.supabase: We couldn't sign you in right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.notAdmin: This email isn't registered as an Al Haual administrator. Contact your super admin if this is unexpected.
errors.callbackInvalid: That recovery link is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
errors.callbackExpired: That recovery link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.inviteExpired: Your invitation link is no longer valid. Ask the admin who invited you to send a fresh invitation.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.intro: Enter the email registered as an Al Haual administrator and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sentBody: If {email} is registered as an Al Haual administrator, a password reset link is on its way. The link is single-use and expires after a short while.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.supabase: We couldn't send the reset link right now. Please try again in a moment.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.intro: Choose a new password for your Al Haual administrator account. Minimum 8 characters.

errors.invalidInput: Please enter a password of at least 8 characters in both fields.
errors.expiredSession: Your reset session has expired. Request a new reset email.
errors.notAdmin: This account isn't registered as an Al Haual administrator.
errors.samePassword: Your new password must be different from your current one. Please choose a different password.
errors.supabase: We couldn't save the new password. Please try again.

setPassword.title: Welcome to Al Haual
setPassword.intro: Pick a password to finish setting up your administrator account. Minimum 8 characters.

errors.invalidInput: Please enter a password of at least 8 characters in both fields.
errors.expiredSession: Your invitation link has expired. Ask the administrator who invited you to send a fresh one.
errors.notAdmin: Your invitation hasn't been finalised yet. Ask the administrator who invited you to retry.
errors.samePassword: You've already set this password for your account. Please choose a different password.
errors.supabase: We couldn't save your password. Please try again.
